name: ebird-gap-finder
description: Self-hosted, bring-your-own-key birding tool: diff your eBird life list against what's being reported nearby and surface the species you haven't seen yet.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @gap/server" "npm run dev -w @gap/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @gap/server && npm run typecheck -w @gap/web
